name: ntfy Notification Provider
description: Sends Metidos notifications to an ntfy topic.

env.description: Optional fallback ntfy topic when no plugin topic setting is configured.
Optional bearer token for protected ntfy topics.

settings.label: ntfy server URL
settings.description: Base URL for the ntfy server. The default manifest allowlist permits only https://ntfy.sh/.

settings.label: ntfy topic
settings.description: Private ntfy topic used for notifications. Falls back to NTFY_TOPIC.

settings.label: Default ntfy topic
settings.description: Compatibility fallback topic when NTFY_TOPIC and topic are not set. Use a private, unguessable topic.

settings.label: Authentication type
settings.description: Authentication method for the configured ntfy topic.

settings.label: Bearer token
settings.description: Bearer token for protected ntfy topics.

settings.label: Username
settings.description: Basic-auth username for protected ntfy topics.

settings.label: Password
settings.description: Basic-auth password for protected ntfy topics.

settings.label: Priority
settings.description: Default priority when the notification request does not specify one.

notificationProviders.name: ntfy
notificationProviders.description: Sends Metidos notifications to an ntfy topic and returns provider receipts.
